customAttributes.description:
Bilbo can't be blocked.
Whenever Bilbo deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.
Burglar's Plot 4U
Sorcery — Adventure
Exchange control of two target nonland permanents that share a card type. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 8/14/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
